category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an open source Diameter authentication protocol implementation; official freeDiameter site describes a Diameter protocol implementation for Authentication, Authorization and Accounting.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub repository use freeDiameter; source_facts.name is freediameter.
docs_sources: Official freeDiameter website provides documentation links, configuration documentation, FAQ/support pages, and the GitHub README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/freeDiameter/freeDiameter, so repo enrichment was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site describe Diameter and AAA; GitHub README describes freeDiameterd, libraries, extensions, and protocol components.
